HGSS.583.0000:
Hello, hello!
I am the official Name Rater!\f
Want me to rate the nicknames of
your Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.583.0001:
Which Pokémon’s nickname should
I critique?
HGSS.583.0002:
[0101,0000,0000], is it? Hmm...
That is a decent nickname!\f
But, I can give it a nicer name?
How about it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.583.0003:
OK, then. What shall the new
nickname be?\f
HGSS.583.0004:
Done!
How about that?\f
From now on, this Pokémon
shall be known as [0101,0000,0000]!\f
It is a better name than before,
isn’t it?\r
Good for you!
HGSS.583.0005:
Ah, good. I see.
Do come visit again if you change\r
your mind.
HGSS.583.0006:
Done! From now on, this Pokémon
shall be known as [0101,0000,0000]!\f
It looks no different from before?
That’s just you!\r
This is vastly superior!\r
How fortunate for you!
HGSS.583.0007:
[0101,0000,0000], is it?
That is a truly impeccable nickname!\f
Take good care of [0101,0000,0000]!
HGSS.583.0008:
Now, now.
That is merely an Egg!
